pr.title: 1.1888 BPB via SP-4096 compression + stride-64 sliding window

output.summary: Combines SP-4096 tokenization with stride-64 sliding eval on an 8-layer GQA stack tuned with Muon optimizer and int8 quantization for better context reuse and compression.
techniques: SP-4096 tokenizer cuts tokens/byte for tighter BPB math
Stride-64 sliding eval gives each target ~960 context tokens
Muon optimizer paired with amax int8 quantization for compact weights
